description: The first maintained CLI for GL.iNet travel routers — named config profiles, travel macros, and version-aware diagnostics no other GL.iNet tool ships.

novel_features.name: Named config profile capture
novel_features.description: Capture your whole router config as a named, reusable profile.

novel_features.name: Version+model-gated restore
novel_features.description: Restore a saved profile, with a safety check that it matches this device.

novel_features.name: Option-level config diff
novel_features.description: See exactly which settings a venue changed vs your standard config.

novel_features.name: WiFi region diagnose + fix
novel_features.description: Find out why a foreign network is invisible and fix the regulatory domain in one command.

novel_features.name: Venue onboarding macro
novel_features.description: One command to get online at a new venue: scan, region-check, join, and prep for captive portals.

novel_features.name: VPN toggle + egress verify
novel_features.description: Start a VPN tunnel, arm the kill-switch, and confirm your public IP actually changed.

novel_features.name: Connection fidelity / leak check
novel_features.description: Verify the VPN is up and your connection isn't leaking: egress country, DNS leaks, and STUN/UDP (WebRTC-style) leaks.

novel_features.name: Connectivity troubleshooter
novel_features.description: Diagnose why the router has no internet and get the exact fix command.

novel_features.name: Source-uplink quality + improvements
novel_features.description: Diagnose a weak/slow venue WiFi uplink and get ranked ways to improve it.

novel_features.name: Doctor / capability probe
novel_features.description: Report this router's model, firmware, OpenWrt/LuCI versions, reachable surfaces, and per-feature availability.

novel_features.name: Current-config summary
novel_features.description: A structured, per-subsystem report of the router's current configuration.

novel_features.name: Config option search
novel_features.description: Find any config option anywhere across the whole router config tree.

novel_features.name: Raw passthrough escape hatch
novel_features.description: Call any GL RPC module/function or any UCI option directly.

novel_features.name: WAN source switch
novel_features.description: Switch the router's WAN source and verify it reconnected.
